languages.text: "Теперь, когда проблема решена, давайте поговорим о дальнейших перспективах".

traits.locale_text: "Теперь, когда проблема решена, давайте поговорим о дальнейших перспективах".

languages.text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."
languages.original_text: "Теперь, когда проблема решена, давайте поговорим о дальнейших перспективах".

traits.locale_text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."
"Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."
"Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."

languages.text: 「問題が解決した今、将来の展望について話さなければならない」
languages.original_text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."

traits.locale_text: 「問題が解決した今、将来の展望について話しましょう。」

languages.text: "Sorun çözüldüğüne göre geleceğe yönelik beklentileri konuşalım."
languages.original_text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."

traits.locale_text: "Sorun çözüldüğüne göre geleceğe yönelik beklentileri konuşalım."

languages.text: «Ahora que el problema ya está resuelto, hablemos de futuras extracciones».
languages.original_text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."

traits.locale_text: «Ahora que el problema ya está resuelto, hablemos de futuras extracciones».

languages.text: “既然问题已解决，我们来谈谈未来前景吧。”
languages.original_text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."

traits.locale_text: “既然问题已解决，我们来谈谈未来前景吧。”

languages.text: « Maintenant que le problème est résolu, parlons plutôt de vos perspectives d'avenir. »
languages.original_text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."

traits.locale_text: « Maintenant que le problème est résolu, parlons plutôt de vos perspectives d'avenir. »

languages.text: "Nun, da das Problem gelöst ist, sollten wir über zukünftige Rekruten sprechen."
languages.original_text: "Now that the problem has been resolved, let's talk about future prospects."

traits.locale_text: "Nun, da das Problem gelöst ist, sollten wir über zukünftige Rekruten sprechen."
